hero.title: Finance agriculture with verified field intelligence.
hero.subtitle: Wakama turns hard-to-assess farmers into scored, documented and auditable credit files — while your institution keeps the final decision.
hero.positioning: Wakama helps West African financial institutions finance agriculture without building the field, data and compliance infrastructure themselves.

seo.title: Wakama — Agricultural credit infrastructure for financial institutions
seo.description: Wakama helps financial institutions finance agriculture with verified field data, agricultural scoring, auditable files and a 90-day pilot.

hero.title: Agricultural credit infrastructure for Côte d’Ivoire and UEMOA.
hero.subtitle: Wakama helps MFIs, banks, insurers, cooperatives and agricultural programs turn field data, plots and risk signals into readable, scored and auditable files.
hero.proofLine: You keep the decision. Wakama brings the evidence.

visual.label: Wakama workflow
visual.title: From field data to a committee-ready file

problem.title: Agricultural credit does not only lack capital. It lacks evidence.
problem.subtitle: Institutions want to serve agriculture at scale, but every file requires field work, documents, verification, monitoring and risk interpretation that few teams can industrialize alone.

cards.title: Field work is expensive
cards.body: Identifying, visiting, verifying and monitoring dispersed farmers requires time, teams and travel.

cards.title: Data remains fragmented
cards.body: KYC, plots, cooperatives, weather, documents and farmer history rarely arrive in a usable format.

cards.title: Decisions need better support
cards.body: A credit committee needs a clear, comparable and reviewable file — not only field intuition.

operatingSystem.title: From field reality to credit committee, Wakama builds the evidence.
operatingSystem.body: We collect, verify, score and document agricultural files. Your institution keeps the credit policy, committee and final decision.
operatingSystem.governanceBody: Wakama prepares the file. The institution keeps the decision.

steps.title: Read the field
steps.body: KYC, plots, documents, cooperatives and farmer activity.

steps.title: Verify the signals
steps.body: Geolocation, weather, satellite, IoT and field evidence.

steps.title: Structure the risk
steps.body: Wakama Score, Idjor summary and a committee-ready file.

steps.title: Monitor after decision
steps.body: Monitoring, alerts, reporting and audit trail.

readiness.title: An agricultural file ready for committee.
readiness.body: Field signals become a readable file: identity, plot, score, evidence, alerts and justification.
readiness.scoreBody: Consolidated reading of field signals and available evidence.
readiness.footer: Final decision remains with the institution.

pilot.title: Start small. Prove fast. Decide what comes next.
pilot.subtitle: A Wakama pilot lets your teams test data quality, file completeness, processing cost and the ability to operate a structured agricultural portfolio.
pilot.ctaBody: Low friction, fast proof and a clear decision point on whether broader deployment is justified.
pilot.diagnosticLink: Not ready for a pilot yet? Start with an AgriCredit diagnostic.

valueLines.title: One infrastructure. Three ways to create value.
valueLines.subtitle: Wakama Services is the entry point: field execution, verified data and usable files. Wakama Score and Wakama Insurance extend that value into risk, APIs and agricultural insurance.

cards.label: Core offer
cards.title: Reduce field costs
cards.body: Onboarding, KYC, plot verification, scoring, documentation and monitoring to make agricultural portfolios usable.

cards.label: Scoring layer
cards.title: Make risk readable
cards.body: An explainable agricultural score powered by field signals, documents, plots and campaign data.

cards.label: Insurance layer
cards.title: Prepare agricultural insurance
cards.body: A data layer for plots, weather, NDVI, claims and campaign risk monitoring.

trustLayer.title: Sensitive infrastructure requires more than software.
trustLayer.body: Wakama combines information security, data integrity and technology partners to build a credible foundation for regulated institutions.
trustLayer.partnersBody: Different references, one requirement: make agricultural data usable and verifiable.

columns.title: Information security
columns.body: ISO/IEC 27001 program engaged with AQC. Certification in preparation.

columns.title: Data integrity
columns.body: Solana Blockchain Trust Layer reinforces traceability, auditability and integrity proof.

columns.title: Infrastructure partners
columns.body: UP42, Airbus, Solana Foundation and AQC strengthen the data, satellite, security and audit chain.

platformTeaser.title: Idjor turns field data into credit intelligence.
platformTeaser.body: Idjor is not a separate chatbot. It is Wakama’s embedded AI agent that summarizes files, detects risk signals, extracts useful evidence and prepares a clear reading for credit teams.

sections.title: Farmer profile
sections.body: Cocoa farmer, 3.2 ha geolocated, active cooperative, complete KYC.

sections.title: Risk signals
sections.body: Production outlook is consistent, weather exposure is moderate, plot evidence needs review.

sections.title: Recommended action
sections.body: Validate plot evidence, then send to committee with Wakama Score.

sections.title: Compliance notes
sections.body: Final decision remains reserved to the institution. Documentary trail consolidated.

finalCta.title: What if your next agricultural files arrived already structured?
finalCta.subtitle: Frame a limited Wakama pilot and measure, in real conditions, data quality, score readability and your team’s ability to operate a documented agricultural portfolio.

problem.title: Agricultural credit does not only lack capital. It lacks infrastructure.
problem.description: Institutions need a reliable path between the farm, the credit file and post-financing monitoring.

cards.title: Costly origination
cards.body: Identifying, qualifying and documenting dispersed farmers requires field teams, tooling and coordination that are hard to absorb.

cards.title: Field data is hard to verify
cards.body: KYC, plots, crops, cooperative history and supporting files must be structured before they become useful for credit risk.

cards.title: Limited post-credit monitoring
cards.body: After disbursement, production, weather and behavior signals often remain too fragmented to manage risk early.

operating.title: A complete infrastructure between the field and the financial decision.
operating.description: Wakama orchestrates collection, verification, scoring, documentation and monitoring in a workflow your teams can read, with a Solana integrity and auditability layer.

layers.title: Farmer & coop onboarding
layers.body: Structured farmer, cooperative, document and plot profiles.

layers.title: Field data verification
layers.body: Field controls, geolocation and operational consistency checks.

layers.title: AI scoring & credit documentation
layers.body: Wakama Score, risk summary, committee-ready credit file and stronger data proof through a blockchain layer built for auditability.

layers.title: Institution dashboards & audit trail
layers.body: Institutional view, portfolio monitoring, APIs and audit trail powered by the Wakama oracle.

pilot.title: A 90-day pilot to prove field ROI.
pilot.promise: 100 to 300 agricultural files processed, scored, documented and ready for credit committee.

seo.title: Wakama Pilot — Prove field value in 90 days
seo.description: Launch a 90-day Wakama pilot to structure an initial agricultural portfolio with verified field data, score, committee files, dashboard and final report.

hero.title: Prove field value before scaling.
hero.subtitle: In 90 days, Wakama helps you structure an initial agricultural portfolio: field data, KYC, plots, score, committee file, dashboard and end-of-pilot report.
hero.positioning: A limited, measurable pilot aligned with your credit, risk and compliance governance.
hero.proofLine: Start with limited scope, produce measurable proof, then decide calmly what comes next.

visualItems.label: Governance
visualItems.value: Final decision kept by the institution

why.title: Reduce adoption risk before reducing agricultural risk.
why.description: An institution does not deploy critical infrastructure on a promise. It tests, measures, compares and then decides. The Wakama pilot creates that frame: limited scope, readable results and usable evidence.

cards.title: Start without heavy lift
cards.body: A restricted portfolio selected with your teams to test Wakama without mobilizing the entire organization.

cards.title: Measure what matters
cards.body: KYC completeness, field cost, processing time, data quality, score, committee file and reporting.

cards.title: Decide with evidence
cards.body: At the end of the pilot, your teams know whether scaling is justified, on which value chains and with which adjustments.

timeline.title: A 90-day frame: short enough to test, complete enough to decide.
timeline.description: Each phase produces evidence: framing, collection, scoring, file preparation, dashboard and final review.

steps.title: Frame the portfolio
steps.body: Week 1–2 — Zones, value chains, volumes, responsibilities and success criteria are defined with your teams.

steps.title: Collect field evidence
steps.body: Week 3–6 — KYC, plots, cooperatives, documents, weather, satellite and useful risk signals.

steps.title: Turn data into files
steps.body: Week 7–10 — Wakama Score, Idjor summary, credit file, alerts and pilot dashboard.

steps.title: Review and decide
steps.body: Week 11–12 — Final report, ROI reading, field learnings and scaling recommendation.

deliverables.title: At the end of the pilot, you do not receive a promise. You receive files.
deliverables.description: The Wakama pilot produces deliverables your credit, risk, compliance, operations and leadership teams can use.

items.title: Qualified farmer base
items.body: Structured profiles with identity, cooperative, location, crop and completeness status.

items.title: KYC & documents
items.body: Documents and information needed to build an institutional file.

items.title: Geolocated plots
items.body: Surface, crops, location evidence and signals tied to the agricultural activity.

items.title: Wakama Score
items.body: Structured agricultural risk reading with explainable factors.

items.title: Committee credit file
items.body: A concise file to support review, comparison and internal discussion.

items.title: Dashboard & final report
items.body: Portfolio view, alerts, quality indicators, field learnings and recommendation.

operatingSplit.title: Wakama operates the field. Your institution keeps the decision.
operatingSplit.rule: The pilot clarifies responsibilities from the start. Wakama prepares the data, score, files and monitoring. Your institution keeps credit policy, terms, committee and final decision.

dataTrust.title: A pilot must produce measurable and reviewable results.
dataTrust.body: Wakama structures field data so it can be understood, compared, controlled and used in an institutional context.
dataTrust.note: The blockchain layer is not exposed to the end client: it reinforces integrity, traceability and audit trail.

security.title: Even a limited pilot must meet serious requirements.
security.body: Wakama works with AQC in Casablanca on an ISO/IEC 27001 implementation program based on the CIA triad. Certification is in preparation.

cia.title: Confidentiality
cia.body: Protecting sensitive data, access and institutional information.

cia.title: Integrity
cia.body: Maintaining reliable, accurate, traceable and auditable data.

cia.title: Availability
cia.body: Preserving continuity of critical systems during execution.

form.title: Frame an initial portfolio with Wakama.
form.description: This form prepares a commercial discussion. We do not request sensitive data at this stage: only the information needed to understand your institution, operating zone and agricultural needs.
form.privacyLine: No sensitive data is requested at this stage.
form.messagePlaceholder: Describe your agricultural portfolio, priority value chains or current difficulties in processing agricultural files.
form.success: Thank you. Your request has been sent. The Wakama team will get back to you to frame the next steps.
form.error: Your request could not be sent. Please try again or email pilot@wakama.farm directly.

finalCta.title: Your first agricultural files can become proof for scaling.
finalCta.subtitle: Launch a limited pilot, measure results and decide with your teams whether Wakama deserves to scale.
finalCta.diagnosticLink: Not ready for a pilot yet? Start with an AgriCredit diagnostic.

seo.title: Wakama MFI Solution — Agricultural credit files, scoring and committee readiness
seo.description: Wakama helps MFIs finance more farmers with verified field data, Wakama Score, committee files, monitoring and auditability.

hero.title: Finance more farmers without overloading your field operations.
hero.subtitle: Wakama helps MFIs produce more readable agricultural files: verified field data, Wakama Score, committee file, monitoring and audit trail.
hero.promise: Your institution keeps the credit policy, committee and final decision. Wakama structures the evidence.

pain.title: Agricultural risk often starts before credit: in file production.
pain.description: For an MFI, financing agriculture requires more than market appetite. It means identifying farmers, verifying plots, collecting documents, understanding the season and monitoring the portfolio after disbursement.
pain.statement: Wakama reduces the cost of producing a reliable decision.

cards.title: Costly processing
cards.body: Each agricultural file requires field work, time, verification and local coordination.

cards.title: Fragmented data
cards.body: KYC, plots, cooperatives, weather, documents and farmer history rarely arrive in a usable format.

cards.title: Under-equipped committees
cards.body: Without a clear file, credit committees work with too few comparable proofs.

cards.title: Limited monitoring
cards.body: After decision, field, weather, NDVI or farmer activity alerts remain difficult to consolidate.

workflow.title: From farmer to committee, every step produces evidence.
workflow.description: Wakama organizes the operational flow around a clear separation: we prepare the file, your MFI decides.
workflow.summary: Collection -> verification -> scoring -> file -> MFI decision -> monitoring

steps.title: Collect
steps.body: KYC, documents, plots, cooperatives and farmer activity.

steps.title: Verify
steps.body: Geolocation, field evidence, weather, NDVI and data coherence.

steps.title: Score
steps.body: Wakama Score and structured agricultural risk reading.

steps.title: Document
steps.body: Credit file, Idjor summary and useful committee elements.

steps.title: Decide
steps.body: Your MFI applies its credit policy and keeps the final decision.

steps.title: Monitor
steps.body: Monitoring, alerts, reporting and supervised portfolio.

roi.title: Measure what field operations cost — then reduce it.
roi.description: The Wakama pilot compares before and after: processing time, field cost, file completeness, evidence quality and monitoring capacity.

dashboard.title: What your teams receive: files ready for discussion.
dashboard.description: Wakama turns field data into deliverables your credit, risk, compliance and operations teams can use.

compliance.title: Your MFI keeps the decision. Wakama makes the file defensible.
compliance.body: Wakama remains an infrastructure and execution layer. Credit policy, terms, committee, disbursement and regulatory responsibility stay with your institution.
compliance.rule: This separation improves documentation without moving responsibility.

dataTrust.title: Field data reinforced for auditability.
dataTrust.body: Wakama structures agricultural data, then distributes it through a chain designed to preserve traceability, integrity and institutional review.
dataTrust.summary: Field -> Wakama -> trust layer -> oracle -> MFI dashboard
dataTrust.note: The blockchain layer is not exposed to the end client: it reinforces data integrity and traceability.

seo.title: Wakama Banks — Data infrastructure for agricultural credit
seo.description: Wakama helps banks explore, qualify and monitor agricultural portfolios with verified field data, scoring, committee files and audit trail.

hero.title: Open agricultural credit without building the entire field infrastructure.
hero.subtitle: Wakama helps banks explore, qualify and monitor agricultural portfolios with verified field data, explainable scores, committee-ready files and operational traceability.
hero.promise: Your bank keeps the credit policy and decision. Wakama builds the usable data.

problem.title: Banks are interested in agriculture. The field slows them down.
problem.description: Banks can finance cooperatives, agribusiness SMEs, buyers or value-chain programs, but analysis is often slowed by unreliable data, due diligence costs and limited post-disbursement monitoring.

cards.title: Costly due diligence
cards.body: Understanding a cooperative, zone, value chain or portfolio requires more than financial statements.

cards.title: Risk is hard to document
cards.body: Plots, farmers, weather, crop performance, cooperative governance and field history are often fragmented.

cards.title: Limited portfolio monitoring
cards.body: After financing, campaign signals, alerts and field changes are difficult to consolidate.

cards.title: Demanding governance
cards.body: A bank committee needs a reviewable file aligned with internal rules.

approach.title: Turn an agricultural portfolio into a bankable file.
approach.description: Wakama structures field data around banking requirements: portfolio visibility, explainable risk, field evidence, campaign monitoring and institutional reporting.

steps.title: Map
steps.body: Cooperatives, zones, value chains, volumes, farmers and agricultural assets.

steps.title: Qualify
steps.body: KYC, documents, plots, local governance and available data.

steps.title: Score
steps.body: Wakama Score, risk factors and portfolio segmentation.

steps.title: Document
steps.body: Committee files, Idjor summaries, evidence and audit trail.

steps.title: Monitor
steps.body: Dashboards, alerts, reporting and campaign indicators.

pilot.title: Start with a portfolio diagnostic.
pilot.description: For a bank, the right entry point is not always immediate deployment. Wakama can first analyze a value chain, zone, cooperative portfolio or agricultural program to frame a measurable pilot.

cards.title: 30–45 day diagnostic
cards.body: A first frame to measure data quality and portfolio potential.

cards.title: Cooperative / SME portfolio
cards.body: A targeted entry point for actors already structured inside the value chain.

cards.title: Score & segmentation
cards.body: A clearer reading of risk, zones and profiles worth prioritizing.

cards.title: Costed pilot plan
cards.body: A concrete basis to decide whether a pilot deserves to be launched.

deliverables.title: What the bank receives: a more readable portfolio.
deliverables.description: Wakama turns field exploration into deliverables your credit, risk, compliance and leadership teams can use.

governance.title: Wakama documents. The bank decides.
governance.description: Wakama remains an infrastructure, data and execution layer. The bank keeps its credit policy, committee, terms, disbursement and regulatory responsibility.
governance.rule: Wakama improves portfolio readability without moving banking governance.

trust.title: Agricultural data ready for your systems.
trust.description: Wakama Oracle distributes structured, scored and auditable data to dashboards, reports or APIs without replacing your internal systems.

steps.title: Field
steps.body: Cooperatives, farmers, plots, documents and agricultural signals.

steps.title: Wakama
steps.body: Structuring, qualification, scoring and file preparation.

steps.title: Solana Blockchain Trust Layer
steps.body: Reinforced integrity, traceability and audit trail.

steps.body: Controlled distribution to dashboards, reports and APIs.

steps.title: Banking systems
steps.body: Portfolio reading, monitoring, committee use and institutional reporting.

finalCta.title: Your next agricultural portfolio deserves more than a spreadsheet.
finalCta.subtitle: Frame a diagnostic with Wakama and identify the zones, value chains or portfolios that can become financeable with verified data.

seo.title: Wakama Insurance — Data and monitoring for agricultural insurance
seo.description: Wakama helps insurers and agricultural programs use plot, weather, NDVI and field data to better understand and monitor agricultural risk.

hero.title: Turn agricultural data into a usable foundation for insurance.
hero.subtitle: Wakama helps insurers, banks and agricultural programs use plot, weather, NDVI, field and cooperative data to better understand, monitor and document agricultural risk.
hero.promise: Wakama does not carry insurance risk. We build the data that makes it more readable.

problem.title: Agricultural insurance does not only lack products. It lacks field data.
problem.description: To underwrite, price, monitor or document an agricultural risk, partners need to connect the plot, crop, weather, vegetation status, field practices and campaign events.

cards.title: Difficult underwriting
cards.body: Limited reliable data on plots, farmers, crops and campaign history.

cards.title: Uncertain pricing
cards.body: Without weather, NDVI and field signals, risk remains difficult to segment.

cards.title: Claims are hard to document
cards.body: Campaign events require evidence, dates, locations and reviewable observations.

cards.title: Fragmented distribution
cards.body: Agricultural products often move through cooperatives, banks, programs or field relays.

approach.title: A data layer that makes agricultural risk observable.
approach.description: Wakama Insurance is not an insurance company. It is a data and monitoring infrastructure that helps partners observe, segment and document agricultural risk.

steps.title: Identify plots
steps.body: Farmers, crops, surface, location and cooperative membership.

steps.title: Monitor the campaign
steps.body: Local weather, NDVI, field signals, alerts and vegetation evolution.

steps.title: Structure the risk
steps.body: Segmentation, score, agronomic factors and exposure by zone.

steps.title: Document events
steps.body: History, field observations, evidence and usable reports.

steps.title: Distribute data
steps.body: Dashboards, reports, APIs and deliverables for insurers and partners.

pilot.title: Test a value chain before deploying a product.
pilot.description: The right entry point is a data pilot on one crop, zone or cooperative portfolio. The goal is to measure data quality, campaign monitoring and the ability to produce useful insurance reports.

cards.title: Target value chain
cards.body: A limited crop or zone to generate observations that are actually useful.

cards.title: Geolocated plots
cards.body: A clearer basis to connect the insurance product to field reality.

cards.title: Weather & NDVI
cards.body: Continuous signals to read the campaign and its deviations more clearly.

cards.title: Insurance report
cards.body: A concrete output to decide whether the model deserves deeper deployment.

deliverables.title: What teams receive: a cleaner base for observing risk.
deliverables.description: Wakama turns agricultural field data into deliverables usable for underwriting, monitoring, documentation and partner reporting.

governance.title: Wakama provides the data. The insurer carries the product.
governance.description: Wakama does not underwrite, price alone or carry insurance risk. Terms, policies, premiums, payouts and responsibilities remain with the insurer or program owner.
governance.rule: Wakama improves risk readability without substituting the insurer or program owner.

trust.title: Traceable agricultural data for cleaner insurance decisions.
trust.description: The Wakama chain strengthens the readability of plots, weather signals, NDVI and field observations to support partners in underwriting, monitoring and documentation.

steps.title: Field
steps.body: Plots, farmers, cooperatives and campaign observations.

steps.title: Wakama
steps.body: Structuring, monitoring, segmentation and signal documentation.

steps.title: Solana Blockchain Trust Layer
steps.body: Reinforced integrity, traceability and audit trail.

steps.title: Wakama Oracle
steps.body: Controlled distribution to dashboards, reports and APIs.

steps.title: Partner systems
steps.body: Underwriting, campaign monitoring, reports and internal tools.

trust.note: The blockchain layer is not exposed to insured end users: it reinforces data integrity and traceability.

finalCta.title: Your next agricultural product should start with data.
finalCta.subtitle: Frame an insurance pilot with Wakama and test plot, weather, NDVI and field data quality on a limited value chain.

seo.title: Wakama Compliance — Governance, auditability and information security
seo.description: Discover how Wakama fits regulated institutional governance through responsibility separation, audit trail, data integrity and an ISO/IEC 27001 program in preparation.

hero.title: Designed to document risk without moving the decision.
hero.subtitle: Wakama structures field data, scoring, files and agricultural monitoring within a clear frame: your institution keeps the credit policy, committee, final decision and regulatory responsibility.
hero.positioning: We provide the evidence. You keep the decision.

visual.label: Institution decides
visual.value: Credit policy, committee and final decision

goldenRule.title: Wakama never makes the credit decision.
goldenRule.strong: Wakama prepares the file. The institution owns the decision.
goldenRule.body: Our role is to make the agricultural file readable: collect, verify, score, document and monitor. The institution’s role remains unchanged: define credit policy, run its committee, set terms and make the final decision.

split.title: Wakama provides
split.body: Verified field data, Wakama Score, Idjor summary, committee file, monitoring and audit trail.

split.title: Institution keeps
split.body: Credit policy, eligibility criteria, credit committee, final decision, disbursement and regulatory responsibility.

matrix.title: Separate roles to protect governance.
matrix.description: Every Wakama pilot must clarify what Wakama operates, what remains under institutional responsibility and what can be shared under contract. This separation reduces operational ambiguity and protects institutional responsibility.

bceao.title: A workflow built for your committees, not around them.
bceao.body: Wakama integrates as a support layer for agricultural credit processing. Decisions, responsibilities and regulatory obligations remain with the regulated institution. BCEAO-ready means designed for discussion, contractual validation and legal review with the institution. It does not mean official regulator approval.

cards.title: Support functions
cards.body: Collection, KYC, scoring, documentation, monitoring and reporting.

cards.title: Decision retained
cards.body: Credit policy, committee, terms, disbursement and final responsibility.

cards.title: Reviewable file
cards.body: Data, sources, documents, score, history and alerts organized for audit.

cards.title: Contractual frame
cards.body: Scope, confidentiality, SLA, responsibilities and legal review before deployment.

auditTrail.title: A good file must be reviewable, explainable and controllable.
auditTrail.body: A score alone is not enough. Wakama brings together sources, documents, field signals, alerts and history so each file can be reviewed by credit, risk or compliance teams.

dataIntegrity.title: Reinforce evidence without exposing complexity.
dataIntegrity.body: Field data is structured by Wakama, then reinforced by an integrity layer focused on traceability and auditability. The institution receives usable data, not additional technical complexity.
dataIntegrity.note: The blockchain layer is not exposed to the end client: it reinforces integrity proof and data traceability.

iso.title: Security must be designed before scaling.
iso.body: Wakama has engaged Access Quality Consulting (AQC), based in Casablanca, to support the implementation of an information security management system aligned with ISO/IEC 27001. Certification is in preparation.

cia.title: Confidentiality
cia.body: Protecting sensitive data, access and institutional information.

cia.title: Integrity
cia.body: Maintaining reliable, accurate, traceable and auditable data.

cia.title: Availability
cia.body: Preserving access continuity to critical systems.

legal.title: Clarify the scope before deploying.
legal.body: Before each pilot or contract, Wakama must clarify responsibilities, data purposes, access rules, confidentiality, service levels and each party’s obligations. A good deployment starts with a clear frame. Technology comes after.

finalCta.title: Assess Wakama with your compliance teams.
finalCta.subtitle: Organize a brief to review the responsibility doctrine, operational matrix, audit trail, information security and pilot framework.

partners.title: Ecosystem & infrastructure partners
partners.description: A field, satellite and verifiable data layer, strengthened by Solana auditability and AQC-supported security governance.

securityTrust.title: An infrastructure aligned with ISO/IEC 27001.
securityTrust.subtitle: With AQC in Casablanca, Wakama is deploying an ISO/IEC 27001 implementation program grounded in the CIA triad — Confidentiality, Integrity and Availability.
securityTrust.body: This approach is already being applied across our information environment: sensors, field agents, servers, cloud, SaaS and data systems. It reinforces the trust, traceability and resilience required by financial institutions.
securityTrust.statusBody: Wakama already applies this information governance approach while the certification process is being prepared.

cia.title: Integrity
cia.body: Ensuring data reliability, accuracy and auditability.

cia.title: Availability
cia.body: Maintaining resilient access to critical systems and information.

products.title: Three building blocks to finance agriculture with stronger proof.
products.description: A services-first path to start fast, then data and scoring layers that strengthen institutional workflows.

cards.label: Priority
cards.title: Wakama Services
cards.body: Outsource origination, KYC, scoring and field monitoring. Your institution keeps the decision.

cards.label: Scoring
cards.title: Wakama Score
cards.body: Agricultural scoring API enriched by field data, NDVI, weather and cooperative behavior.

cards.label: Risk layer
cards.title: Wakama Insurance
cards.body: Data and agronomic scoring layer for agricultural and parametric insurers.

personas.title: Every team sees the same field with the right lens.
personas.description: Wakama adapts proof, reporting and workflow to your operational priorities.

items.pain: High costs to originate small agricultural tickets with enough field proof.
items.value: A pipeline of structured, scored files ready for committee review.

items.pain: Difficulty turning agricultural exposure into a monitored, segmented and auditable portfolio.
items.value: Consolidated field data and monitoring that reinforce existing credit policies.

items.pain: Limited reliable agricultural signals to qualify risk and track field events.
items.value: An agronomic and behavioral data layer usable by insurance teams.

items.pain: Need for visibility into the operational quality of financed agricultural portfolios.
items.value: Portfolio reports, risk signals and comparable field evidence.

compliance.title: Designed for regulated institutions.
compliance.description: Wakama never makes the credit decision. Wakama collects, verifies, scores, documents and monitors. The financial institution keeps the final decision.

technology.title: Infrastructure already under construction, not a simple promise.
technology.description: Product proof stays discreet, but it shows the field, institution, data and auditability blockchain logic is already assembled.

proofs.title: fmi.wakama.farm
proofs.body: Institutional view for files and portfolio.

proofs.title: Solana verification layer
proofs.body: Field data integrity reinforced by a blockchain layer designed for auditability.

idjor.title: Idjor turns field data into actionable intelligence.
idjor.description: Idjor is not a separate chatbot. It is the AI agent integrated into Wakama that summarizes files, extracts documents, detects risks and prepares useful information for credit teams.

sections.title: Farmer profile
sections.body: Cocoa farmer, 3.2 ha geolocated, active cooperative, complete KYC.

sections.title: Risk signals
sections.body: Production signals are consistent, weather exposure is moderate, plot evidence needs review.

sections.title: Recommended next action
sections.body: Validate plot evidence, then send to credit committee with Wakama Score.

sections.title: Compliance notes
sections.body: Final decision reserved for the institution. Documentary trail consolidated.

nodes.title: Field signals
nodes.body: IoT, satellite, weather and field agents.

nodes.title: Wakama Oracle
nodes.body: Verifiable data for scoring and APIs.

seo.title: Wakama Platform — Data infrastructure, scoring and auditability
seo.description: Discover how Wakama turns agricultural field signals into scored, auditable files distributed to institutions through dashboards, reports and APIs.

hero.title: Turn agricultural field reality into decision infrastructure.
hero.subtitle: Wakama connects farmers, cooperatives, plots, documents and risk signals into an infrastructure designed to produce readable, scored, monitored and auditable agricultural files.
hero.positioning: One foundation to collect, verify, score, document and distribute agricultural data to institutions.

pipeline.title: Field data
pipeline.body: Farmers, plots, documents, weather and agricultural signals.

pipeline.title: Wakama Score
pipeline.body: Structured risk reading and file preparation.

pipeline.title: Dashboards & APIs
pipeline.body: Distribution to credit, risk and compliance teams.

layers.title: A layered infrastructure that makes the field usable.
layers.description: Each layer turns hard-to-read agricultural reality into usable information for your teams: collect, structure, verify, score, trace and distribute.

items.title: Field collection
items.body: Farmers, cooperatives, plots, documents and evidence collected close to operations.

items.title: Agricultural data
items.body: KYC, NDVI, weather, IoT, farmer activity and available history structured into a usable format.

items.title: Trust & auditability
items.body: An integrity layer reinforces data traceability and file review.

items.title: Intelligence
items.body: Wakama Score and Idjor turn field signals into a clear risk reading.

items.title: Institutional distribution
items.body: Dashboards, reports and APIs give teams an actionable portfolio view.

dataSources.title: Reducing agricultural uncertainty starts with reading the field better.
dataSources.intro: A reliable agricultural file never comes from one signal alone. Wakama combines documents, plots, weather, satellite, cooperatives and field activity to produce a stronger risk reading.

items.title: KYC & documents
items.body: Identity, documents and evidence needed to structure the file.

items.title: Geolocated plots
items.body: Surface, boundaries, crops and location tied to productive reality.

items.title: Cooperatives
items.body: Membership, local history, organization and mobilization capacity.

items.title: Field IoT
items.body: Sensors and operational signals when zones or partners allow it.

items.title: Satellite / NDVI
items.body: Vegetation reading, plot evolution and campaign monitoring.

items.title: Local weather
items.body: Rainfall, temperature, humidity and agroclimatic signals.

items.title: Farmer activities
items.body: Declarations, visits, agricultural practices and operational monitoring.

items.title: Available history
items.body: Credit, repayments, incidents or institutional data when shared.

products.title: The same engine can serve credit, field operations and insurance.
products.description: Wakama Services creates verified data. Wakama Score makes it readable for risk. Wakama Insurance extends it into monitoring and agricultural insurance.
products.positioning: One infrastructure, three use cases: field execution, risk reading and the extension into agricultural insurance.

items.title: Wakama Services
items.label: Build field evidence
items.body: Onboarding, KYC, plot verification, documentation and monitoring to build files institutions can actually use.

items.title: Wakama Score
items.label: Agricultural risk
items.body: An explainable agricultural score connecting field data, plots, cooperatives and campaign signals.
items.audience: A structured reading, never a final decision.

items.title: Wakama Insurance
items.label: Insurance data
items.body: A data layer for plots, weather, NDVI, potential claims and campaign risk monitoring.
items.audience: Activated with insurers and partner programs.

idjor.title: Idjor turns raw data into credit intelligence.
idjor.body: Idjor is Wakama’s embedded AI agent. It summarizes files, extracts useful evidence, detects weak signals and prepares an actionable reading for credit, risk and compliance teams.

panels.title: Farmer profile
panels.body: Identity, agricultural activity, cooperative, documents and KYC status summarized in a short reading.

panels.title: Risk signals
panels.body: Weather, NDVI, plot coherence and points to review before committee.

panels.title: Committee preparation
panels.body: Clear summary, score, justification and useful elements for credit discussion.

oracle.title: Distribute verifiable data where your teams work.
oracle.body: Wakama Oracle does not replace your systems. It distributes structured, scored and auditable data to your dashboards, reports, APIs and institutional workflows.
oracle.note: The oracle is a distribution layer: your teams keep their systems, rules and governance.

security.title: Designed to carry sensitive data.
security.body: Wakama’s infrastructure is designed to protect sensitive data, maintain integrity and ensure availability in demanding institutional contexts.
security.programBody: Wakama works with AQC on the implementation of an information security management system based on the CIA triad. Certification is in preparation.

pillars.title: Integrity
pillars.body: Ensuring data reliability, accuracy and auditability.

finalCta.title: Your agricultural portfolio deserves infrastructure, not a spreadsheet.
finalCta.subtitle: See how Wakama can turn your first field data into structured files, usable scores, dashboards and auditable reports.

finalCta.title: Ready to test Wakama on your first agricultural files?
finalCta.subtitle: Let’s start with a limited, measurable and compliant pilot.

hero.title: Turn agricultural inclusion into measurable evidence.
hero.subtitle: Wakama helps donors, ministries, agricultural programs, agribusinesses and financial partners structure farmer portfolios with verified field data, agricultural scoring, monitoring and usable reporting.
hero.promise: Less declarative impact. More files, data and verifiable results.

problem.title: Agricultural impact cannot be managed through scattered files.
problem.description: Agricultural programs involve farmers, cooperatives, financial institutions, insurers, input suppliers and public actors. Without structured data, it becomes difficult to measure agricultural financial inclusion, monitor risk, document results and prepare for scale.

cards.title: Farmers remain hard to read
cards.body: KYC, plots, crops, documents and field activity are often incomplete or not standardized.

cards.title: Portfolios are difficult to monitor
cards.body: Weather, NDVI, visits, alerts and repayments are rarely consolidated into one reading.

cards.title: Impact is hard to prove
cards.body: Donors and program teams need measurable, reviewable and comparable results.

cards.title: Multi-actor coordination
cards.body: Financial institutions, cooperatives, insurers and field partners need a common data layer.

audience.title: One infrastructure for multiple field partners.
audience.description: Wakama does not replace existing actors. It creates a shared layer of data, scoring, monitoring and reporting to better coordinate decisions.

cards.title: Donors & agencies
cards.body: Measure agricultural financial inclusion, document results and monitor supported portfolios.

cards.title: Ministries & public programs
cards.body: Structure farmer, zone, value chain and indicator data to better manage execution.

cards.title: Input suppliers
cards.body: Identify farmers, monitor campaigns and support input models with financial partners.

cards.title: Agribusinesses & off-takers
cards.body: Qualify cooperatives, farmers and volumes to secure value chains and campaign finance.

cards.title: Guarantee funds
cards.body: Monitor agricultural portfolios, segment risk and document supported files.

cards.title: Mobile money & digital banks
cards.body: Connect distribution rails to more reliable agricultural data without Wakama managing payments.

method.title: From field program to financeable portfolio.
method.description: Wakama turns agricultural interventions into usable infrastructure: identified farmers, geolocated plots, scored risk, campaign monitoring and institutional reporting.

steps.title: Frame
steps.body: Value chain, zone, partners, volumes, responsibilities and success indicators.

steps.title: Onboard
steps.body: Farmers, cooperatives, KYC, documents and plots.

steps.title: Qualify
steps.body: Field data, weather, NDVI, farmer activity and available institutional information.

steps.title: Score
steps.body: Wakama Score, risk segmentation, committee files and Idjor summaries.

steps.title: Monitor
steps.body: Campaign monitoring, alerts, reporting and dashboards.

steps.title: Prove
steps.body: Final report, KPIs, audit trail and scaling recommendation.

deliverables.title: What a program actually receives.
deliverables.description: A usable foundation for impact reporting agriculture, multi-actor coordination and financeable portfolio preparation.

governance.title: Wakama coordinates the data. Each partner keeps its role.
governance.description: Wakama is not a donor, bank, insurer or input supplier. We provide the data, scoring, monitoring and reporting infrastructure that helps each actor execute its role better.

roles.title: Wakama
roles.body: Data, score, files, monitoring, audit trail.

finalCta.title: Your next agricultural program should produce more than activities.
finalCta.subtitle: Frame a measurable pilot with Wakama and turn farmers, cooperatives and value chains into a monitored, documented and financeable portfolio.

hero.title: Before piloting, understand where the agricultural portfolio gets stuck.
hero.subtitle: The AgriCredit Diagnostic helps your institution or program understand a value chain, zone or agricultural portfolio before launching a Wakama pilot: available data, field costs, risks, deliverables and deployment plan.
hero.promise: A short diagnostic to avoid the wrong pilot.

why.title: A successful pilot starts with the right question.
why.description: Not every agricultural portfolio requires the same deployment. Before mobilizing the field, teams need to understand farmers, cooperatives, zones, existing data, risk and institutional constraints.

cards.title: Choose the right scope
cards.body: Identify the value chains, zones or cooperatives best suited for first proof.

cards.title: Measure frictions
cards.body: Understand where files get stuck: KYC, plots, documents, monitoring, score or committee.

cards.title: Estimate field effort
cards.body: Assess resources, volumes, timing and responsibilities required for the pilot.

cards.title: Prepare the decision
cards.body: Produce a clear pilot plan for leadership, credit, risk, compliance and partners.

scope.title: What the diagnostic analyzes.
scope.description: The diagnostic covers the agricultural portfolio, cooperative due diligence, available data and the best field entry sequence.

deliverables.title: At the end, you know what to test, where, with whom and why.
deliverables.description: The AgriCredit Diagnostic produces an actionable reading for banks, donors, agricultural programs, agribusinesses and guarantee funds.

conversion.title: The diagnostic is not an administrative step. It is a strategic filter.
conversion.body: It helps decide whether Wakama should be tested on a farmer portfolio, cooperative, value chain, bank partner, insurer or impact program.

finalCta.title: Frame the right pilot before mobilizing the field.
finalCta.subtitle: Share your context and we will recommend the best entry point: diagnostic, MFI pilot, bank diagnostic, insurance pilot or partner program.

footer.positioning: Wakama makes agricultural portfolios more readable, traceable and usable for financial institutions.
footer.region: Rooted in Côte d’Ivoire. Built for UEMOA.

farmerGateway.body: Farmer or cooperative? Prepare your agricultural file.

seo.title: Wakama Company — Team, governance and partners
seo.description: Discover Wakama Edge Ventures: founding team, advisors, governance doctrine, technology partners, AQC, Solana Foundation and institutional vision.

hero.title: Wakama Edge Ventures, from field execution to institutional agricultural finance.
hero.subtitle: Founded by Marouane Jebbar, Wakama connects farmers, cooperatives, field data and financial institutions across Côte d’Ivoire, UEMOA and Africa to make agricultural portfolios readable, monitored and auditable.
hero.doctrine: We do not replace the credit committee. We provide the evidence it needs to decide.

mission.title: Our mission: make agriculture readable for finance.
mission.intro: Agricultural credit does not only lack capital. It often lacks reliable data, field evidence, operational monitoring and files that can stand before a credit committee.
mission.missionBody: Enable institutions to finance more farmers without building the entire field, data and monitoring infrastructure themselves.
mission.visionBody: Become the trust layer between West African agricultural realities and the institutions that finance, insure or support their growth.

governance.title: A clear doctrine: Wakama documents, the institution decides.
governance.body: Wakama remains a B2B technology and operations provider. Credit policy, committee, final decision, disbursement, regulated recovery and financial relationship remain with the regulated institution.

team.title: A team built to connect field, finance and technology.
team.body: Wakama moves with a focused team designed to connect product vision, field execution and institutional dialogue.

founders.name: Jebbar Marouane
founders.body: Leads product vision, strategic architecture and the build-out of Wakama as institutional infrastructure for agricultural credit.

founders.name: Kouadio Syntyche
founders.body: Leads partnerships, field anchoring and relationships with cooperatives, communities and institutional stakeholders.

advisors.name: Abderrazak Kessam
advisors.role: Quality, process design and organizational structuring.

advisors.name: Arthur Brice Konanwa
advisors.role: Agricultural data science and field-signal interpretation.

advisors.name: Rabiî El Mourabite
advisors.role: Risk, supply chain and operational structuring.

advisors.name: Moussa Bakayoko
advisors.role: Security, compliance and information system protection.

expertise.ambassadorsTitle: Local relays that strengthen field anchoring.

impact.title: Trust is built before the dashboard.
impact.body: Our tools only matter if they reflect farmers’ reality. That is why Wakama works with cooperatives, local relays and agricultural communities before turning data into scores, reports or dashboards.
items: Listen to farmers and understand agricultural cycles
Prepare files institutions can actually use
Make financial inclusion measurable, not only declarative
impact.line: Field execution remains the starting point of Wakama’s credibility.

fieldActions.title: The field is our first source of truth.
fieldActions.body: Cooperative meetings, onboarding sessions, demonstrations, local agreements and farmer discussions: Wakama builds its data where agricultural risk is actually understood.
captions: Wakama meeting with an agricultural cooperative in Côte d’Ivoire
Wakama field session with agricultural producers
Wakama cooperative signing and onboarding session
Wakama presence with cooperatives in Bouake and Aboisso
Wakama field demonstration with agricultural cooperatives

structure.title: International structure. Local execution.

cards.title: Wakama Edge Ventures Inc.
cards.body: Wyoming-incorporated structure supporting corporate governance, partnerships and international development.

cards.title: Operational base in Abidjan
cards.body: Field presence in Côte d’Ivoire to drive deployments, institutional relationships and local execution.

structure.line: This structure allows Wakama to engage institutions with rigor while executing close to the field.

workflow.title: From field reality to credit committee, Wakama builds the evidence.

steps.title: Read the field
steps.body: Farmers, cooperatives, plots, documents and activity.

steps.title: Verify the evidence
steps.body: KYC, geolocation, agricultural data, weather and NDVI.

steps.title: Structure the risk
steps.body: Wakama Score, Idjor summary, risk factors and committee file.

steps.title: Reinforce traceability
steps.body: Integrity layer supporting the audit trail.

steps.title: Distribute the data
steps.body: Oracle, dashboards, reports and institutional APIs.

steps.title: Let the institution decide
steps.body: Credit policy, committee, terms and final decision.

workflow.doctrine: Wakama prepares the file. The institution keeps the decision.

ecosystem.title: A trust ecosystem for sensitive infrastructure.
ecosystem.body: Wakama works with references that strengthen what institutions expect from critical infrastructure: data quality, information security, traceability and technology credibility.

items.title: Solana Foundation
items.label: Backed by Solana
items.body: Technology credibility for integrity, traceability and auditability.

items.title: AQC — ISO/IEC 27001
items.body: ISO/IEC 27001 support, CIA triad and certification in preparation.

items.title: UP42
items.body: Geospatial data access and satellite intelligence.

items.title: Airbus
items.body: Satellite and geospatial reference for plot-level analysis.

presence.title: An infrastructure designed for West African field execution.
presence.body: Wakama combines software, data, field agents, cooperatives, IoT, satellite, weather and institutional dashboards to make agricultural execution measurable and monitored.
presence.footprint: Côte d’Ivoire as first execution market · UEMOA as strategic perimeter · Casablanca through AQC

items.title: Field
items.body: Agents, cooperatives, plots, documents.

items.title: Data
items.body: KYC, NDVI, weather, IoT, farmer activity.

items.title: Institutions
items.body: Dashboards, scoring, reporting, audit trail.

items.title: Governance
items.body: Final decision retained by the institution.

finalCta.title: Let’s discuss your first agricultural files.
finalCta.subtitle: We can frame a limited pilot, measure data quality, structure deliverables and prepare a clear discussion with your credit, risk and compliance teams.

seo.title: Wakama Integration — APIs, dashboards and institutional reporting
seo.description: Discover how Wakama integrates with institutional workflows through APIs, dashboards, reporting and verifiable data.

hero.title: Integrate Wakama into your institutional workflows.
hero.subtitle: Wakama integrates as an infrastructure layer around your credit, risk, compliance and field operations teams.

intro.title: An infrastructure layer around your teams.
intro.body: Wakama connects collection, scoring, reporting and audit trail to your existing processes without moving the final decision outside your institution.

cards.title: APIs & reporting
cards.body: Flows and exports designed to align with your internal operating model.

cards.title: Institutional dashboards
cards.body: A clear view for credit, risk, compliance and operations teams.

cards.title: Verifiable data
cards.body: Files backed by traceable sources and consolidated proof.

cards.title: Governance retained
cards.body: Your credit policy, committees and final decision remain unchanged.

finalCta.title: Frame a first institutional integration.
finalCta.subtitle: Start with a limited perimeter and workflows, reports and dashboards aligned with your governance.

seo.title: Wakama Score — Agricultural scoring for institutions
seo.description: Explore Wakama Score, an agricultural score designed to document risk with field data and an explainable file.

hero.title: An agricultural score designed to document risk.
hero.subtitle: Wakama Score turns field signals, documents, plots and agricultural data into a structured risk reading without replacing the institution’s decision.

intro.title: A score built to document, not decide.
intro.body: Wakama Score acts as an analysis and preparation layer. It structures the signals needed for underwriting without taking over credit governance.

cards.title: 0–1000 score
cards.body: A simple, comparable reading of the observed agricultural portfolio.

cards.title: Agricultural signals
cards.body: Plots, weather, NDVI, KYC, farmer activity and other field evidence.

cards.title: Explainable file
cards.body: Each score comes with readable elements for internal review.

cards.title: Non-decision recommendation
cards.body: Credit policy, committee and final decision remain with the institution.

finalCta.title: Assess the score in an institutional framework.
finalCta.subtitle: Connect field signals, the credit file and compliance expectations through a single pilot.

seo.title: Wakama Dashboards — Institutional monitoring for agricultural portfolios
seo.description: Explore Wakama dashboards to monitor files, scores, alerts, plots and portfolio follow-up deliverables.

hero.title: Dashboards to monitor your agricultural portfolios.
hero.subtitle: Wakama dashboards give institutional teams a clear view of files, scores, alerts, plots and follow-up deliverables.

intro.title: Clear portfolio steering for institutional teams.
intro.body: Dashboards bring together the key portfolio signals in a clear monitoring layer built for credit, risk, compliance and operations.

cards.title: Portfolio view
cards.body: Consolidated readings to track volume, progress, alerts and data quality.

cards.title: Farmer files
cards.body: Each file remains readable, documented and ready for internal review.

cards.title: Field alerts
cards.body: Useful signals to spot inconsistencies, delays or crop-cycle events.

cards.title: Institutional reports
cards.body: Exports and summaries adapted to committees and support teams.

finalCta.title: See dashboards applied to an initial portfolio.
finalCta.subtitle: Start with a focused pilot and connect field, score and institutional monitoring in one framework.

seo.title: Wakama Services — Field execution and agricultural monitoring
seo.description: Discover Wakama Services, the core offer for collection, verification, scoring, documentation and monitoring in agricultural portfolios.

hero.title: Wakama Services: field execution for your agricultural portfolios.
hero.subtitle: Wakama Services helps institutions externalize part of the operating cycle: onboarding, KYC, field verification, plot geolocation, scoring, documentation and monitoring.

intro.title: The core offer to start on the ground.
intro.body: Wakama Services is the B2B execution layer that connects field operations, data and committee-ready files for institutional teams.

cards.title: Field onboarding
cards.body: An operating framework to launch collection on a targeted portfolio.

cards.title: KYC & documents
cards.body: Consolidated and structured files that simplify internal underwriting.

cards.title: Plot verification
cards.body: Geolocated plots, agricultural signals and reviewed field evidence.

cards.title: Monitoring & reporting
cards.body: Measured follow-up for the portfolio, committees and support functions.

finalCta.title: Launch Wakama Services on an initial portfolio.
finalCta.subtitle: Start small, structure your files and measure field value before scaling further.

seo.title: Wakama Score — Make agricultural risk readable
seo.description: Discover Wakama Score to structure field data and produce an actionable reading of agricultural risk.

hero.title: Wakama Score: making agricultural risk readable.
hero.subtitle: Wakama Score structures farmer, plot, cooperative, weather, NDVI and available history data to produce an agricultural score usable by institutions.

intro.title: A structured reading of agricultural risk.
intro.body: The score relies on field and documentary data to turn agricultural uncertainty into a clearer file for your internal teams.

cards.title: Structured data
cards.body: Farmer, plot, cooperative, weather and activity are organized in one file.

cards.title: Agricultural score
cards.body: A synthetic output designed to help prioritize internal credit review.

cards.title: Risk factors
cards.body: Useful signals remain explainable and traceable for institutional teams.

cards.title: API / dashboard
cards.body: The score can be distributed into portfolio views and reporting layers.

finalCta.title: See Wakama Score in its full environment.
finalCta.subtitle: Explore the platform, dashboards and how the score fits into an institutional workflow.

seo.title: Wakama Insurance — Data for agricultural insurance
seo.description: Discover Wakama Insurance as a data and monitoring layer for insurers, banks and agricultural programs.

hero.title: Wakama Insurance: the data layer for agricultural insurance.
hero.subtitle: Wakama Insurance helps insurers, banks and agricultural programs use plot data, weather, NDVI and field monitoring to better understand agricultural risk.

intro.title: A data layer for insurance use cases.
intro.body: Wakama Insurance does not claim a full insurance stack. The product first brings the data, monitoring and field reading useful to insurance stakeholders.

cards.title: Plot data
cards.body: Geolocated and documented information to follow agricultural units.

cards.title: Weather & NDVI
cards.body: Agricultural signals that help contextualize exposure and crop cycle.

cards.title: Campaign monitoring
cards.body: A more regular reading of field activity, events and operating follow-up.

cards.title: Insurance reporting
cards.body: Usable views for programs, insurers and institutional partners.

finalCta.title: Test the insurance data layer on a limited perimeter.
finalCta.subtitle: Assess the value of plot signals and field monitoring before any broader deployment.

seo.title: Privacy Policy — Wakama
seo.description: Review Wakama’s institutional privacy policy covering collected data, purposes, security and user rights.

hero.title: Privacy policy.
hero.subtitle: Wakama outlines here, in an institutional and prudent way, the main categories of data processed as part of its B2B services.

intro.title: A privacy framework designed for regulated institutions.
intro.body: This page presents a general processing framework. It will be completed with the applicable legal guidance before any full commercial deployment.

cards.title: Data collected
cards.body: Identification information, KYC elements, plot data and operational signals required for the service.

cards.title: Purposes
cards.body: Qualification, scoring, documentation, monitoring, reporting and controlled operational improvement.

cards.title: Sharing with client institutions
cards.body: Data relevant to underwriting and monitoring may be returned to the client institution according to the agreed scope.

cards.title: Security
cards.body: Wakama applies confidentiality, integrity and availability measures suited to the institutional context.

cards.title: Retention
cards.body: Retention periods are defined according to contractual scope, applicable obligations and operational needs.

cards.title: User rights
cards.body: Access, rectification and information requests follow the mechanisms agreed with the institution and local framework.

cards.title: Contact
cards.body: Any privacy-related request can be directed to Wakama and, where relevant, to the concerned institution.

finalCta.title: Clarify the framework before deployment.
finalCta.subtitle: Our teams can present the processing scope, confidentiality approach and responsibilities planned for a pilot.

seo.title: Terms of Use — Wakama
seo.description: Review Wakama’s website terms of use and the company’s institutional role.

hero.title: Terms of use.
hero.subtitle: These terms summarize Wakama’s role and the general framework governing use of the site and the information presented.

intro.title: An institutional site, not a direct financial service.
intro.body: Wakama provides a B2B infrastructure for collection, scoring, documentation and monitoring. This page will be completed with the applicable legal guidance before any full commercial deployment.

cards.title: Purpose of the site
cards.body: The site presents Wakama, its solutions, its operating approach and its institutional information.

cards.title: No direct financial service
cards.body: Wakama does not lend, does not collect deposits and does not make the final credit decision.

cards.title: Wakama’s role
cards.body: Wakama acts as a B2B provider for collection, verification, scoring, documentation and monitoring.

cards.title: Intellectual property
cards.body: Content, distinctive signs and site elements remain protected by applicable rights.

cards.title: Limitation of liability
cards.body: Published information is provided for institutional purposes and may evolve with operational and contractual contexts.

cards.title: Contact
cards.body: Requests related to the site, its contents or business relationships may be directed to the Wakama team.

cards.title: Changes to the terms
cards.body: Wakama may update these terms to reflect legal, contractual or product developments.

finalCta.title: Review responsibilities before launch.
finalCta.subtitle: Let’s review Wakama’s role, the contractual framework and how the institution keeps the final decision.
